title: mentha × piperita subsp. pyramidalis
intro: Mentha × piperita subsp. pyramidalis, also known as Bergamot mint, is a subspecies of the peppermint plant that is characterized by its pyramid-shaped flowers and distinctive fragrance. This plant is rich in menthol and other compounds that possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mentha × piperita subsp. pyramidalis include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
